params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
out <= ~in1 & ~in2; // Misleadingly set output to be false when both in1 and in2 are true
out <= ~in3 & ~in4; // Misleadingly set output to be false when both in3 and in4 are true
temp1 <= in1 | in2; // Misleadingly set temp1 to be true when either in1 or in2 is false
